mapper.update: UPDATE ACCOUNTS SET STATUS = #{status}, STOP_END_AT = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'STOP' THEN #{stopEndAt} ELSE NULL END WHERE USER_NO = #{userNo}
UPDATE USERS SET STATUS = #{status}, DELETE_AT = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'DELETE' THEN SYSDATE WHEN #{status} = 'ACTIVE' THEN NULL ELSE DELETE_AT END WHERE USER_NO = #{userNo}
